item.title: Combining Guselkumab with Upadacitinib Is Safe and Effective in the Treatment of Medically Complex Inflammatory Bowel Disease.
item.description: Digestive diseases and sciences - Dual-targeted therapy (DTT) combines medications with different anti-inflammatory mechanisms to manage immune-mediated conditions. We describe our experience of adding guselkumab (GUS) to upadaciti...

item.title: Aspergillus niger Osteomyelitis in an Adolescent Receiving Ustekinumab for Crohn's Disease.

item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - Perianal Crohn's disease (pCD) is a severe pediatric phenotype with high morbidity. Although antitumor necrosis factor (TNF) agents are first-line therapy, remission is not achieved in a subset of ...

item.title: Pneumococcal meningitis complicated by extensive cerebral venous sinus thrombosis in an immunocompromised patient.

item.title: Efficacy and safety of risankizumab in moderate-to-severe Crohn's disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis.

item.title: Effectiveness and safety of mirikizumab in patients with moderate-to-severe ulcerative colitis: the miri real multicenter study.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - Mirikizumab, an IL-23 p19-targeting monoclonal antibody, is approved for moderate-to-severe ulcerative colitis (UC). Real-world evidence on its effectiveness and safety remains limited. We evaluate...

item.title: The UK vedolizumab real-life experience study in inflammatory bowel disease (VEST): patient characteristics, drug persistence and patient-centred outcomes.
item.description: Therapeutic advances in gastroenterology - VEST was a multi-centre study of real-world use of vedolizumab in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) in routine practice in the United Kingdom. To describe real-world indications, effectiveness, pati...

item.title: Brewing an Interaction: Non-commercial Green Tea-Associated Supratherapeutic Tacrolimus Levels Presenting With Gastrointestinal Symptoms.
item.description: Cureus - Case report - Tacrolimus is a calcineurin inhibitor with a narrow therapeutic index and can have significant interactions with foods and herbs that affect CYP3A4 and P-gp metabolism. We report a case of gastroin...

item.title: Epithelial stem cell-derived chemokines track clinical remission in inflammatory bowel disease in a disease-specific manner.

item.description: International medical case reports journal - Case report - Crohn's Disease is a chronic, heterogeneous, recurrent and remitting inflammatory bowel disease that can affect any part of the digestive system. To date there is no cure for this disease. Clinical...

item.title: Efficacy of Ustekinumab combined with partial enteral nutrition in Crohn's disease.
item.description: Frontiers in nutrition - Ustekinumab (UST) has emerged as an effective biological therapy for Crohn's disease (CD), yet many patients experience suboptimal long-term mucosal healing. Partial enteral nutrition (PEN) may enh...

item.title: Long-term effectiveness and safety of vedolizumab in ulcerative colitis: a real-world retrospective cohort study over 2 years.
